results.rendered_html:
unnayana (wie eben) n.
1〉 das Herausnehmen, Schöpfen  KĀTY. ŚR. 9,5,24 . 10,9,30 . 22,10,5 .
— 2〉 das Gefäss, aus welchem geschöpft wird,  KĀTY. ŚR. 25,12,14 .
— 3〉 das Auseinanderführen, Abscheiden, Schlichten; s. sīmantonnayana.
— 4〉 das Folgern, Schliessen  H. 322 . śravaṇādanu paścādīkṣā anvīkṣā unnayanam Sch. zu  GOT. S. _in_ Z. d. d. m. G. 6,3, N. 3 .

results.rendered_html:
unnayana a. With the eyes raised upwards;  R. 4. 3. 
— naṃ
1 Raising, elevating, lifting up.
2 Drawing up water.
3 The vessel out of which a fluid is taken.
4
(pb) Leading away, extracting.
5 Making straight, smoothing; sīmaṃta˚.
6 Deliberation, discussion.
7 Inference; śravaṇādanu paścādīkṣā anvīkṣā unnayanaṃ.
